description: UI↔CLI Parity initiative — close the asymmetries between the cockpit and the `compose` CLI documented in docs/ui-cli-parity.md. Each surface should be able to drive a feature/bug through its full lifecycle; today gate resolution is UI-only (blocks headless/CI) and the fix/new lifecycles are CLI-only (invisible to UI-first devs). Reuses existing server endpoints and pipeline machinery as the substrate — no new lifecycle model. Umbrella for COMP-PARITY-1 through COMP-PARITY-6.
